name: context7
description: Context7 MCP integration for up-to-date library and API documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch current library and API docs through Context7 MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds the Context7 MCP server so Codex can resolve libraries and query current, version-aware documentation during coding tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use Context7 for the latest Next.js docs.
Find the current API for this library.
